narrative:
Waldo Twp. township has 807 registered voters, with 50.2% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 35.6% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 14.3%, a pronounced Republican lean of 21.3 percentage points.
